message:
🐛 fix: unlock next level's criteria in feedback inventory (#8444)

For an L1 repo, L2 items need to be open so the user can work on them.
Previously c.level > earnedLevel locked everything above, including
the target level. Now c.level > earnedLevel + 1 — the next level
stays unlocked, only L3+ is locked for an L1 repo.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
